name: mock-roundtable
stop_condition: Stop after one mock round and one final synthesis.

turns.name: draft
turns.instruction: Produce a concrete first draft. Mention assumptions, risks, and next checks.

turns.name: critique
turns.instruction: Critique the draft. Focus on missing evidence, recovery behavior, and final-document quality.

final.name: final
final.instruction: Synthesize the roundtable into Agreement, Disagreement, Final Proposal, and Next Action.
